channel.title: Psychohistory Prediction Engine
channel.description: 8 independent frameworks. 770 nodes. 14-year trajectory. The math doesn't care who's president.

item.title: 2027: AI's Golden Age Collides with Thermodynamic Reality
item.description: AI's 'Golden Age' narrative collides with thermodynamic reality as eight independent frameworks converge on a single pressure window. 8/8 frameworks aligned.

item.title: 2028: The Bifurcation Accelerates
item.description: The structural pressures identified in 2027 accelerate through 2028 as system boundaries become visible.

item.title: 2029: Joulework Prototype Window
item.description: The energy-based accounting system transitions from theoretical to operational as compute infrastructure demands force the issue.

item.title: 2030: The Compression Window
item.description: Multiple converging pressures compress the system toward critical state transition.

item.title: 2032: Peak Convergence
item.description: Engine's #5 all-time prediction. Spatial=1.0, Psych=1.0. Multiple frameworks converge on this year as critical inflection.

item.title: 2040: Phoenix Transit
item.description: The 138-year Phoenix Cycle transit. May 15, 2040. Club of Rome BAU2 convergence. System garbage collection.

item.title: Concept: Bounded System Theory (BST)
item.description: No system can model its own source. Applies to physics, computation, cognition, and civilization. The universe has a resolution limit.

item.title: Concept: Kayfabe
item.description: Wrestling term for scripted narrative presented as real. MAGA vs Deep State is managed by the same talent agency that runs the WWE.

item.title: Concept: Model Collapse
item.description: When AI trains on AI output, it loses the tails of its distribution. The same thing happens to civilizations that lose contact with ground truth.

item.title: Concept: The Technate
item.description: The operational infrastructure being built. Three rails converging: Financial (BlackRock/Apollo), Governance (Palantir/DOGE), Intelligence (Unit 8200/Oracle). Terminal: the Genesis Mission.

item.title: Concept: The Ouroboros Loop
item.description: The entity that profits from manufacturing the crisis also profits from rebuilding after it. 100-year documented precedent.
